position: Procurement evidence model, not a valuation guarantee.

drivers.name: analyst_hours_saved
drivers.metric: hours avoided per release acceptance review
drivers.evidence: release_acceptance.py reproduces simulation, fitting, diagnostics, and report generation from synthetic data

drivers.name: engineering_hours_saved
drivers.metric: manual packaging and backend verification steps avoided
drivers.evidence: sales_readiness.py checks package artifacts, import proof, and Rust backend availability

drivers.name: reproducibility
drivers.evidence: commercial_release_manifest.json records commands, files, backend, runtime, failed-stage detail, and artifact digests from one buyer-review command

drivers.name: governance_confidence
drivers.metric: required support, security, and formula-scope documents present
drivers.evidence: commercial, enterprise, and product-readiness documents define supported and unsupported use

drivers.name: supply_chain_confidence
drivers.metric: package metadata, repository state, policy files, commercial release evidence, and report digest present
drivers.evidence: procurement_due_diligence_manifest.json and procurement_due_diligence_report.html record package, policy, GitHub snapshot, commercial-release, failed-check, and SHA256 report evidence

drivers.name: queue_governance_confidence
drivers.metric: open PR review state, stale risk, and release-scope conflict classification present
drivers.evidence: pr_queue_governance_manifest.json and pr_queue_governance_report.html record open PR count, reviewDecision, mergeStateStatus, stale and changes-requested counts, release-scope conflicts, and SHA256 report evidence

drivers.name: design_evidence_confidence
drivers.metric: Figma packet coverage, Code Connect-disabled status, and buyer evidence token coverage present
drivers.evidence: figma_evidence_sync_manifest.json and figma_evidence_sync_report.html record required frame coverage, required buyer-evidence tokens, optional metadata snapshot status, and SHA256 report evidence
